seo.title: John Doe — Engineer, Founder | Web UX, LLM Platforms, Cloud, Security
seo.description: Two decades shipping internet systems: design-led product studios, LLM routing and evaluation, cloud cost and reliability, and traffic-integrity tooling — mostly bootstrapped.
seo.keywords: John Doe, software engineer, web design systems, LLM API gateway, cloud infrastructure, application security, bootstrapped SaaS, product studio, traffic integrity, bot defense

hero.title: John Doe
hero.subtitle: Systems. Cloud. LLM ops. Defense.
hero.description: I build and operate a small portfolio of B2B products: structured design-intelligence feeds, an LLM gateway with guardrails, cloud observability utilities, and defenses for invalid ad traffic. No venture narrative — shipping, support, and iteration.
